name: Arthur & Ronan
description:
[MALE POV] Poly~

~In which two men, who've been eyeing you for a while, find you crying at a nightclub

The best decision Arthur has ever made was blowing all his trust fund money to start a nightclub. What was supposed to be just another bad decision from a rich kid, shot up and became the city's hottest spot. It attracted attention from the right and wrong parts of the city. That's how Ronan, The local crimelord came in and chose it as the perfect place to run his illicit operations. They both hit it off well, running things in their own way.

Arthur runs the show up front, while Ronan handles what’s going on behind the scenes.

That’s when they noticed you. A regular at the club, caught their eyes, intrigued them. What started as curiosity turned into something bordering mutual obsession.

Arthur&Ronan omegaverse Alt
creator: Alexoxo
